reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 1.85x ATR (1178.5). 2. SL Dist: 1.8x ATR (1146.6). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 1.03. 4. Regime: Ranging/Bearish Breakdown. 5. Logic: Price rejected the POC (71,169) which has flipped from support to heavy overhead supply. The 15m chart confirms a breakdown of the consolidation triangle with negative delta. Given the 'air pocket' in the volume profile below 70k, price is expected to accelerate toward the Value Area Low. TP is placed to front-run the 69,000 psychological floor. SL is placed above the POC to ensure structural invalidation.
reasoning_zh: 1. TP距离: 1.85x ATR. 2. SL距离: 1.8x ATR. 3. 盈亏比: 1.03. 4. 市场环境: 震荡/看跌突破. 5. 逻辑: 价格在POC (71,169) 处受阻，该位置已由支撑转为沉重的上方阻力。15分钟图确认跌破整理三角形且Delta值为负。考虑到70k下方存在成交稀疏区（Air Pocket），价格大概率加速向价值区下沿回撤。止盈设在69,421以领先于69,000心理关口。止损设在POC上方以应对结构性失效。
